plain_english_summary: Deterministic multimodal transport and dispatch layer for the Zer0pa encoding family. Ten modalities through a single 20-bit transport word.
commercial_wedge: Platform architecture — the integration thesis that makes domain lanes composable. Not the first buying surface. Commercial value surfaces through IoT, XR, Robotics, and Geo product repos.
technical_wedge: Unified 20-bit transport word dispatching 10 modalities. 276,798 IMC words/sec, Rust-backed native backend, deterministic byte-identical replay, CPU-native.
ideal_first_buyer: Not the first buying surface. Domain repos (IoT, XR, Robotics, Geo) are the entry points. IMC may become relevant to multimodal platform teams later.
deployment_model: Platform architecture — Python package with Rust-backed native kernel
family_position: Umbrella integration and dispatch layer for the entire Zer0pa deterministic encoding family.
